name: re-prompt
description: Run local re-prompt Codex session retrospectives from inside Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Review local Codex sessions and improve the next prompt
interface.longDescription: Use re-prompt from Codex to inspect local stored Codex sessions, find high-friction turns, generate better next prompts, and preview conservative AGENTS.md suggestions without uploading raw transcripts.
defaultPrompt: Use re-prompt to review my latest Codex session
Preview AGENTS.md rules from recent sessions
